partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete, Phase 2 partial (algebraic infrastructure done), Phase 4 complete (wiring done). Single remaining gap: timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent requires countermodel construction over TimelineQuot.

completion_data.completion_summary: Wired dense_completeness_fc to use TimelineQuot-based architecture. Created TimelineQuotAlgebra.lean (AddCommGroup transfer, sorry-free) and TimelineQuotCompleteness.lean (completeness theorem structure). Single remaining sorry in timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent which requires truth lemma or countermodel construction infrastructure.

review_reason: One sorry remains in timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent. This requires either (A) building truth lemma infrastructure over TimelineQuot, (B) a satisfiability transfer theorem, or (C) direct countermodel construction. User decision needed on approach.
